name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Active widget header now shows trade phase: 'L×1 [P1]' (sacred bracket, pre-1.5R, no trail/pyramid/flip) vs 'L×2 [P2]' (zone-driven ride, post-1.5R BE-lock fired). Phase forwarded from tracker.phase via /api/stocks/runtime-status → poller → broadcaster. Earlier: closed widget right-edge slopes to exit_price; halt amber cue wired (poller now reads top-level data.halted); trail line dropped from closed widgets; visible-range filter for closed widgets; full info-block visibility; correct qty math.
